name: Exception to Insider Stock Compensation Tax

eligibility.description: Disqualified individuals (insiders) of expatriating corporations who exercise options or sell stock compensation before the expatriation date.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Prevents the imposition of the section 4985 excise tax on stock options or compensation if the individual recognizes income under section 83 or recognizes gain/loss in full on or before the expatriation date.
